headlines: Ditch Manual Sourcing. Use AI Instead
Stop Wasting Hours on Talent Searches
AI Sourcing Workflows That Actually Work
Manual Sourcing Is Dead. Here's Proof.
primary_texts: Tired of copy-pasting candidate info into spreadsheets? This 90-minute workshop shows you how to build AI-powered sourcing workflows that find top talent automatically — no LinkedIn required. Join us April 2nd. Grab your spot →

You're spending 10+ hours weekly on manual sourcing. What if AI did 80% of that work? Learn the exact workflows top recruiters use to build talent pools faster and smarter. Limited seats available. Register now →

Manual sourcing is eating your week alive. In this hands-on workshop, you'll build AI workflows that discover, organize, and qualify candidates while you sleep. Basic €79 / Pro €129 with AI Toolkit. Save your seat →
What takes you 3 hours takes AI 15 minutes. Join recruiters who've ditched manual sourcing for intelligent workflows that actually scale. April 2nd, live and interactive. Claim your spot →

Your competitors are automating their sourcing. Are you? This workshop teaches you step-by-step how to replace tedious manual tasks with AI-powered systems that work around the clock. Don't get left behind. Sign up today →
